summary: Dashboard mobile narrow layout meets functional requirements with proper state rendering and navigation, but shows palette drift from brand standards with generic UI colors instead of diner aesthetic

violations.description: Dashboard uses generic gray/white UI surfaces instead of diner palette - missing teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea backgrounds, using neutral colors that contradict brand identity
Signed-in dashboard chrome uses generic palette that has visually merged with neutral UI defaults rather than maintaining separation from public marketing surfaces

actions: Apply diner palette surfaces to dashboard - use cream #fff8ea for card backgrounds instead of white
Consider teal #9fd8d2 accent elements or appropriate diner palette integration for authenticated surfaces
Ensure visual continuity between public marketing brand treatment and post-login dashboard experience
